data.author: Dyedgreen

changelog.release_notes:
* Updated the app for the new 4.0 OS
* Added MapQuest to provide public transit directions
* Minor stability improvements for automatic navigation

* Added automatic navigation for bicycle and pedestrian routes (BETA)
* Minor changes to the configuration page
* Improved summary view now displays information more intelligently (e.g. 83 min becomes 1 h 23 min)
* The summary view now respects the users prefered unit system (Imperial / Metric)
* The app now supports navigation with up to 40 individual steps (doubling the previous 20)
* Minor improvements to the API integration

* Added configuration that allows you to specify up to five favourite addresses
* Added a more descriptive error message concerning voice-dictation errors

* Fixed a bug where an empty navigation was displayed when bluetooth was disconnected
* Minor UI fixes

hardware_platforms.name: basalt
hardware_platforms.description:
Directions is a fast and simple navigation app.

Select how you want to travel, speak your destination, and get a list of instructions that guide you there. Directions for cars, bicycles, public transit, and pedestrians are available.

New features:
• Automatic navigation for bicycles and pedestrians (BETA, please report any problems below)
• You can add up to five favourite locations from the config page

If you want to give feedback, report a bug, suggest a new feature, or experience problems with automatic navigation, consider submitting the google form linked as the website below :)

The directions are powered by the HERE API. For more information about HERE visit https://developer.here.com
